name: OpenCode AI - GitHub Codespaces
postCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y wget libnss3 libnspr4 libatk1.0-0 libatk-bridge2.0-0 libcups2 libdrm2 libxkbcommon0 libxcomposite1 libxdamage1 libxrandr2 libgbm1 libasound2 && sudo npm install -g opencode-ai && wget -O opencode.deb https://opencode.ai/download/stable/linux-x64-deb && sudo apt-get install -y ./opencode.deb && rm opencode.deb
